provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official 2026/27 BA(SE) course-list PDF publishes 25 usable course codes and titles: seventeen Major courses including the Practicum, three Final Year Project courses, and five Cross-Faculty Core courses. It explicitly labels eight Major courses for Year 1 Admission only and two for Senior Year Admission only; those admission-path labels are preserved without assigning recommendedYear or semester. The Cross-Faculty Core description explicitly assigns 1 credit point to each component, so the five coded Component I, II and III options are recorded as 1-cp courses. Other individual course credits are left unknown: programme-level totals are not allocated to courses, and SED4094 describes two 1.5-cp parts without explicitly publishing a per-course total, so it is not summed here. One course row, Special Education in Mainland China, has the code 'To be provided' and is omitted rather than assigned an invented code. Representative linked official course pages independently confirm the code and English course identity for SED1064, SED4060, SED4094 and CFC3026; the course-list PDF remains the source for displayed titles, groups and admission-path labels. The supplement preserves the Component III choice and the Honours Project / Capstone Project alternatives without asserting one fixed graduation path or completion.
